name: 女娲补天
zh: 远古时代，水神共工与火神祝融争斗，共工怒触不周山，天柱折断，天空出现大洞。女娲炼五色石补天，斩鳌足立四极，杀黑龙济冀州，积芦灰止淫水。天地终于恢复安宁。
en2: In ancient times, the water god Gonggong rammed Mount Buzhou in rage, shattering the pillar of heaven. The sky cracked and floods swept the earth. Goddess Nuwa smelted five-colored stones to patch the heavens, cut a giant tortoise's legs to prop up the sky, and piled ash to stop the floods. Order was restored to the world.

name: 后羿射日
zh: 上古时期，天上十日并出，大地焦灼。帝俊赐神弓于后羿，后羿引弓射落九日，只留一个照耀大地。从此天下重归太平。
en2: In a golden age turned catastrophe, ten suns rose together and scorched the earth, drying rivers and wilting crops. The divine archer Hou Yi took up his enchanted bow and shot down nine of the ten suns, sparing one to warm the world. The grateful emperor rewarded him with the elixir of immortality.

name: 大禹治水
zh: 大禹改堵为疏，历经十三年三过家门而不入，终于将洪水引入大海。天下人皆敬服，舜禅位于禹。
en2: When floods drowned the ancient world, Emperor Yao sent Gun to stop them, but his dams failed. Yu, Gun's son, spent thirteen years channeling water into rivers and seas, passing his own home three times without stopping. His selfless labor tamed the floods and the emperor passed him the throne.

name: 盘古开天
zh: 天地混沌如鸡子，盘古生于其中。万八千岁后，阳清为天，阴浊为地。盘古死后身体化为天地万物。
en2: Before creation, the universe was a dark, formless egg. For eighteen thousand years, Pangu slept inside. He pushed heaven and earth apart with his immense body. His breath became wind, his voice thunder, his eyes the sun and moon. When he finally died, his body transformed into every mountain, river, and living thing.

name: 嫦娥奔月
zh: 后羿射日后获不死药，嫦娥情急吞下飞向月宫。从此独守广寒宫，只有玉兔相伴。每年八月十五后羿遥祭月中嫦娥。
en2: After Hou Yi shot down the nine suns, the emperor gave him an elixir of immortality. His wife Chang'e swallowed it in a moment of temptation and floated up to the moon. There she lives forever in the cold Lunar Palace, accompanied only by a jade rabbit who pounds herbs beneath an osmanthus tree.

name: 精卫填海
zh: 炎帝之女溺亡于东海，化为精卫鸟，衔西山木石日复一日誓填东海，永不停息。
en2: The youngest daughter of Emperor Yan ventured out to sea and drowned. Her spirit transformed into a small speckled bird named Jingwei. Refusing to accept defeat, she flies endlessly from the western mountains, dropping twigs and pebbles into the Eastern Sea, determined to fill it — no matter how long it takes.

name: 牛郎织女
zh: 牛郎与织女相爱成婚。天帝发怒，王母用银簪划出银河分隔二人。每年七月初七喜鹊搭桥让他们相会。
en2: The mortal cowherd Niulang and the celestial weaver goddess Zhinu fell in love and married. The Queen Mother of Heaven, furious that a goddess wed a mortal, drew the Milky Way across the sky to separate them. Once a year, on the seventh night of the seventh month, a bridge of magpies forms so the lovers may briefly meet.

name: 白蛇传
zh: 白素贞是修炼千年的白蛇精，与许仙相恋。法海将她镇压在雷峰塔下，其子孝心感天终获自由。
en2: The white snake Bai Suzhen had cultivated power for a thousand years. Taking human form, she fell in love with the scholar Xu Xian near West Lake. The monk Fa Hai imprisoned her under Leifeng Pagoda. Decades later, her devoted son earned enough spiritual merit to shatter the pagoda and set her free.

name: 黄帝战蚩尤
zh: 黄帝与蚩尤大战于涿鹿。蚩尤呼风唤雨，黄帝请来旱魃，最终擒杀蚩尤统一华夏。
en2: Two titans clashed at the Battle of Zhuolu. Chiyou summoned thick fog and storms to confuse the Yellow Emperor's forces. The Yellow Emperor called upon the drought goddess Ba to burn away the mist, then invented a compass chariot to navigate the chaos. He defeated Chiyou and unified the tribes into one civilization.

name: 夸父逐日
zh: 夸父与太阳赛跑，渴极饮干黄河渭水仍不够，终渴死。其手杖化为桃林，福泽后人。
en2: The giant Kuafu decided to race the sun across the sky. He ran with tremendous speed but thirst overwhelmed him. He drank the Yellow River dry, then the Wei River, but it was not enough. He collapsed and died reaching for the northern lake. His wooden staff sprouted into a vast peach forest to shade future travelers.

name: 孟姜女哭长城
zh: 孟姜女万里寻夫到长城，得知丈夫已死。她放声痛哭，哭倒了长城八百里，感天动地。
en2: When her husband was conscripted to build the Great Wall and never returned, Lady Meng Jiang walked a thousand miles in winter to find him. At the Wall she learned he had died and been buried within. Her grief was so boundless that she wept for days until a great stretch of the Wall crumbled, revealing his bones.

name: 哪吒闹海
zh: 哪吒在海边打死龙王三太子。龙王兴师问罪，哪吒削骨还父削肉还母。后莲花化身重生。
en2: The divine child Nezha killed the Dragon King's third son while bathing in the sea. When the Dragon King threatened his family, Nezha sacrificed himself — slicing flesh from bone to return everything to his parents, releasing them from blame. The immortal Taiyi Zhenren rebuilt him from lotus flowers, granting him a second life.

name: 梁山伯与祝英台
zh: 祝英台女扮男装求学，与梁山伯结为知己。被迫嫁人后梁山伯病死，祝英台投坟殉情，化为蝴蝶双飞。
en2: Zhu Yingtai disguised herself as a man to attend school, where she and Liang Shanbo became inseparable companions. When her family forced her to marry another, Liang Shanbo died of heartbreak. On her wedding day, Zhu Yingtai threw herself on his grave, and the two were reborn as butterflies dancing together forever.

name: 西游记
zh: 孙悟空大闹天宫后被压五行山下。后保护唐僧西天取经，历经九九八十一难终成正果。
en2: Sun Wukong, the Monkey King, stormed heaven itself before being imprisoned under Five Elements Mountain by the Buddha. Freed after five centuries, he joined the monk Xuanzang on a pilgrimage to India for sacred scriptures. Together with Pig and Sandy, they survived eighty-one ordeals and achieved enlightenment.

name: 伏羲画卦
zh: 伏羲观天象地理，仰观俯察，画出八卦，教人渔猎嫁娶，开创华夏文明。
en2: The sage-king Fuxi gazed at the stars, studied the earth, and observed birds and beasts. From these patterns he derived the Eight Trigrams — the foundation of divination, philosophy, and Chinese cosmology. He also taught people to fish with nets, hunt with weapons, and build families through proper rites of marriage.

name: 普罗米修斯盗火
zh: 普罗米修斯从奥林匹斯山偷取天火赐予人类。宙斯大怒将他锁在高加索山上，每日鹰啄其肝，永无止境。
en2: The Titan Prometheus defied Zeus and stole fire from Mount Olympus, hiding it in a fennel stalk to bring warmth and civilization to shivering humanity. Zeus took terrible revenge — Prometheus was chained to a peak in the Caucasus where an eagle tore out his liver each day. Each night it regrew, and the torment began again.

name: 阿佛洛狄忒诞生
zh: 当克洛诺斯砍伤父亲时，血与神力落入大海，泛起白色泡沫，爱与美的女神阿佛洛狄忒从海面翩然升起。
en2: When the Titan Kronos wounded his father Ouranos and flung the flesh into the sea, divine foam billowed on the waves off Cyprus. From that radiant foam arose Aphrodite, the goddess of love and beauty, fully formed and carried to shore on a scallop shell. Wherever she walked, flowers bloomed beneath her feet.

name: 特洛伊战争
zh: 帕里斯拐走海伦引发十年战争。希腊联军用木马计攻破特洛伊城，结束了这场史诗般的战争。
en2: When the Trojan prince Paris abducted the beautiful Helen from Sparta, her husband Menelaus rallied all Greece for war. For ten brutal years, heroes like Achilles and Hector clashed before Troy's walls. The Greeks finally won not by strength but by cunning — hiding warriors inside a giant wooden horse left as a gift.

name: 奥德修斯历险
zh: 奥德修斯在特洛伊战后漂泊十年，历经独眼巨人、女巫、海妖塞壬等险阻终回故乡与妻团聚。
en2: After the fall of Troy, Odysseus faced ten years of wandering before reaching home. He blinded the Cyclops Polyphemus, escaped the witch Circe, sailed past the deadly Sirens lashed to his mast, and navigated Scylla and Charybdis. Through it all, his wife Penelope waited faithfully, unraveling her weaving each night.

name: 伊卡洛斯之翼
zh: 代达罗斯用蜡和羽毛为儿子伊卡洛斯造翅膀逃离克里特。伊卡洛斯飞得太高，蜡被太阳融化坠海而亡。
en2: To escape King Minos of Crete, the craftsman Daedalus fashioned wings from feathers and wax. He warned his son Icarus: fly neither too high near the sun nor too low near the sea. Icarus, intoxicated by flight, soared ever higher until the sun melted the wax. He tumbled into the sea — the first cautionary tale about hubris.

name: 俄耳甫斯冥府寻妻
zh: 俄耳甫斯为救亡妻入冥府，以琴声感动冥王。但回头一望，妻子永远消失在黑暗中。
en2: Orpheus, whose music could move stones and rivers, descended into the underworld to reclaim his dead wife Eurydice. He charmed Hades and Persephone with his lyre, and they agreed to release her on one condition — he must not look back. Almost at the surface, overcome by longing, he glanced behind him. She was gone forever.

name: 忒修斯与弥诺陶洛斯
zh: 忒修斯深入克里特迷宫斩杀牛头怪弥诺陶洛斯，凭阿里阿德涅的线团走出迷宫。
en2: Every nine years, Athens sent fourteen young people to be devoured by the Minotaur in Crete's labyrinth. The hero Theseus volunteered to go. Princess Ariadne gave him a thread to mark his path. He plunged into the dark labyrinth, slew the Minotaur with his hands, and followed the thread back to freedom.

name: 潘多拉魔盒
zh: 宙斯为惩罚人类创造潘多拉并赠予魔盒。潘多拉打开盒子释放出所有灾祸，唯有希望留在盒底。
en2: Zeus had Hephaestus craft Pandora, the first woman, endowing her with beauty, curiosity, and deceit. As a wedding gift, she received a sealed jar containing all the world's evils. Unable to resist, she opened it — disease, war, and misery escaped into the world. Only one thing remained at the bottom: Hope.

name: 珀尔修斯斩美杜莎
zh: 珀尔修斯用雅典娜的铜盾当镜子，避开美杜莎的石化目光，斩下蛇发女妖头颅。
en2: The hero Perseus had to slay Medusa, a Gorgon whose gaze turned men to stone. Athena gave him a polished shield as a mirror. Guided by the reflection, Perseus struck off Medusa's head without meeting her eyes. From her blood sprang the winged horse Pegasus. He later used her severed head to rescue princess Andromeda.

name: 丢卡利翁大洪水
zh: 宙斯降大洪水毁灭人类。丢卡利翁与妻子乘方舟存活，投石造人重建世界。
en2: Zeus, enraged by human wickedness, sent a catastrophic flood to wash away civilization. The Titan Prometheus warned his son Deucalion, who built a chest-boat with his wife Pyrrha. They drifted nine days before landing on Mount Parnassus. An oracle told them to cast stones — each one grew into a new human being.

name: 奥西里斯与伊西斯
zh: 奥西里斯被弟弟赛特谋害分尸。妻子伊西斯走遍世界收集碎片使其复活，奥西里斯成为冥界之王。
en2: Osiris, the good king of Egypt, was murdered and dismembered by his jealous brother Set, who scattered the pieces across the land. His devoted wife Isis searched tirelessly, gathering every fragment and using her powerful magic to resurrect him. Though he could not return as king, Osiris became the eternal ruler of the underworld.

name: 拉神的太阳船
zh: 太阳神拉每日驾太阳船横渡天空，夜间穿过冥界与巨蛇阿波菲斯战斗，黎明重生。永恒循环。
en2: The sun god Ra was reborn each morning as Khepri, the scarab pushing the sun above the horizon. He sailed his golden barque across the sky, then descended into the twelve divisions of the underworld at night. There he battled the chaos serpent Apophis, who threatened to swallow the sun and plunge the world into eternal darkness.

name: 荷鲁斯之眼
zh: 荷鲁斯为父报仇与赛特大战失去左眼。托特神治愈了他的眼睛，荷鲁斯之眼成为保护与治愈的象征。
en2: After Osiris was murdered, Horus battled his uncle Set to reclaim the throne of Egypt. During their fierce struggle, Set tore out Horus's left eye and shattered it. The god Thoth reassembled and healed the eye. This restored 'wedjat' — the Eye of Horus — became Egypt's most powerful symbol of protection and healing.

name: 阿努比斯称心
zh: 死者在冥界接受审判。阿努比斯将死者心脏放在天平上与真理之羽比重，心重者被怪兽吞噬。
en2: In Egyptian belief, death was not the end but a judgment. Anubis, the jackal-headed god, led the deceased to the Hall of Two Truths, where the heart was weighed against the Feather of Ma'at — truth and justice. A light heart meant eternal paradise in the Field of Reeds. A heavy heart was devoured by the beast Ammit.

name: 斯芬克斯之谜
zh: 斯芬克斯出谜题：什么生物早上四条腿中午两条腿晚上三条腿？俄狄浦斯答出是人，斯芬克斯自毁。
en2: Outside Thebes, the Sphinx — lion-bodied, woman-headed — devoured every traveler who failed her riddle: 'What walks on four legs at dawn, two at noon, three at dusk?' When the wandering Oedipus answered 'Man — who crawls, walks, then uses a staff,' the Sphinx was so undone she hurled herself from her cliff to her death.

name: 赛特与混沌
zh: 赛特是混沌与沙漠之神，杀死兄弟奥西里斯夺取王位，最终被荷鲁斯击败流放。
en2: Set was the god of deserts, storms, and chaos — powerful but feared. Jealous of his brother Osiris's kingship, Set tricked him into a coffin, drowned him, then dismembered him and scattered the pieces. He ruled Egypt until Horus, Osiris's avening son, challenged him in an eighty-year battle and finally defeated him.

name: 天照大神
zh: 天照大神因弟弟暴行而躲入天岩户，世界陷入黑暗。众神设宴歌舞将她引出，光明重返人间。
en2: Susanoo, god of storms, went on a destructive rampage — breaking irrigation ditches and defiling his sister Amaterasu's sacred weaving hall. Horrified, Amaterasu sealed herself in a cave, plunging the world into darkness. The eight million gods celebrated noisily outside until curiosity drew her out, restoring light to all creation.

name: 伊邪那岐与伊邪那美
zh: 伊邪那岐与伊邪那美用天沼矛搅动海水创造日本列岛。伊邪那美死后入黄泉，伊邪那岐追去却恐惧逃回。
en2: The creator gods Izanagi and Izanami stood on the Floating Bridge of Heaven and stirred the primordial ocean, forming the islands of Japan. They married and bore the gods of nature. But Izanami died in childbirth. Izanagi descended to Yomi, the underworld, found her rotting, and fled in terror — sealing the entrance forever.

name: 桃太郎
zh: 老夫妇在桃中发现男孩。桃太郎长大后率领狗、猴、鸡前往鬼岛讨伐恶鬼，凯旋归来。
en2: An old childless couple discovered a giant peach floating down the river. Inside was a baby boy — Momotaro, Peach Boy — born to be a hero. He grew up strong and brave, and with gifts of millet dumplings he befriended a dog, a monkey, and a pheasant, then sailed to Onigashima Island to defeat the demons terrorizing the land.

name: 八岐大蛇
zh: 须佐之男用八桶酒醉倒八头大蛇八岐大蛇并将其斩杀，从蛇尾获得神剑天丛云。
en2: The storm god Susanoo discovered a weeping family whose daughters were being devoured one by one by the eight-headed serpent Yamata no Orochi. He tricked the beast into drinking eight vats of strong sake, then slew it while it slept. In the creature's tail he found Kusanagi — the legendary divine sword of Japan.

name: 竹取物语
en: The Tale of the Bamboo Cutter
zh: 老翁在竹中发现女婴辉夜姬。她长成绝世美女后拒绝所有求婚者，最终返回月宫，留下不死药。
en2: A bamboo cutter found a luminous baby girl inside a glowing stalk. Named Kaguya-hime, she grew into a woman of unsurpassing beauty, drawing suitors including the emperor himself. But she was no mortal — she was from the Moon Kingdom. When her people came for her, she returned to the heavens, leaving behind only grief.

name: 浦岛太郎
zh: 渔夫浦岛太郎救了海龟被带去龙宫。住了三天回来发现已过三百年，打开宝盒瞬间白发苍苍。
en2: The young fisherman Urashima Taro rescued a sea turtle and was brought to Ryugu-jo, the Dragon Palace beneath the waves. There he spent what felt like three joyful days as the sea princess's guest. Returning home, he found three hundred years had passed. He opened a forbidden box — and instantly aged to dust.

name: 雪女
zh: 暴风雪中出现的美丽雪女，用冰冷呼吸夺人性命。她爱上一个年轻樵夫，但秘密被发现后消失。
en2: On a blinding snowstorm night, the Snow Woman appeared before two woodcutters. She breathed her icy breath on the elder, freezing him to death, then spared the younger on the condition he never speak of her. Years later, he recognized his wife as the Snow Woman and broke his vow. She vanished in a flurry of snow forever.

name: 富士山传说
zh: 辉夜姬返回月宫前留下不死药。天皇命人在最高山焚烧此药，山因此永远冒烟，名为不死山。
en2: When Kaguya-hime was taken back to the moon, she left the emperor a vial of the elixir of immortality. Heartbroken at losing her, he saw no reason to live forever. He ordered soldiers to take it to the summit of the highest mountain and burn it. The smoke has risen from that peak ever since, giving the mountain its eternal soul.

name: 诸神黄昏
zh: 世界末日之战。巨狼吞噬太阳，世界之蛇升起。诸神与巨人同归于尽，世界在火与洪水中毁灭后重生。
en2: Ragnarok — the Doom of the Gods — was foretold from the beginning. Three winters without summer would come; brothers would kill brothers. The wolf Fenrir and the Midgard Serpent would break free. Thor and the Serpent would slay each other. Odin would be swallowed whole. But from the ashes, a green world would be reborn.

name: 世界树
zh: 世界树尤克特拉希尔连接九大世界。鹰栖于顶端，恶龙尼德霍格啃噬根部，松鼠传递纷争。
en2: The cosmic ash tree Yggdrasil spans all nine worlds of Norse mythology, from Asgard above to Niflheim below. A wise eagle sits at its crown while the dragon Nidhogg endlessly gnaws its roots. The squirrel Ratatoskr scurries between them carrying insults, embodying the eternal tension between order and chaos.

name: 托尔战巨蛇
zh: 雷神托尔多次与环绕世界的巨蛇耶梦加得交锋。在诸神黄昏中两者同归于尽。
en2: The thunder god Thor and the Midgard Serpent Jormungandr were destined enemies from birth. Thor nearly caught the serpent on a fishing trip, dragging it to the surface with an ox-head hook. At Ragnarok they finally met in their last battle. Thor slew the great serpent but staggered nine steps before falling, poisoned by its venom.

name: 洛基的诡计
zh: 洛基是诡计之神。他导致光明之神巴德尔之死，最终被锁在岩石上受蛇毒滴面之苦。
en2: Loki, the shape-shifting trickster of Asgard, arranged the death of Baldur — the beloved, near-invulnerable god of light — by tricking the blind god Hodr into throwing a mistletoe dart. As punishment, the gods bound Loki to a rock with the entrails of his own son. A serpent drips venom on his face; his writhing causes earthquakes.

name: 奥丁求智慧
zh: 奥丁为获得智慧，将自己倒挂在世界树上九天九夜，并挖出一只眼睛投入智慧之泉。
en2: Odin, king of Asgard, was not content with power — he craved wisdom. He hung upside-down from Yggdrasil for nine days and nine nights, fasting, pierced by his own spear. In that ordeal, the secret of the runes revealed itself to him. He also sacrificed one eye to drink from Mimir's well of cosmic knowledge.

name: 芬里尔巨狼
zh: 巨狼芬里尔是洛基之子。诸神用矮人锻造的魔锁束缚他。诸神黄昏时他挣脱束缚吞噬奥丁。
en2: When the gods foresaw Fenrir would cause destruction, they tried to bind him with iron chains, but he snapped them easily. Only Gleipnir — a magical ribbon forged by dwarves from impossible things like the sound of a cat's footstep and the roots of a mountain — could hold him. At Ragnarok he breaks free and swallows Odin whole.

name: 搅拌乳海
zh: 天神与阿修罗合力搅拌乳海以获取不死甘露。巨蛇为绳，曼陀罗山为杵，搅出毒药、宝物和甘露。
en2: In the distant age of gods and demons, both sides agreed to churn the cosmic milk ocean together — using Mount Mandara as the rod and the great serpent Vasuki as the rope. From the churning emerged the wish-granting cow, divine nymphs, Lakshmi the goddess of fortune, and finally Amrita — the nectar of immortality.

name: 罗摩衍那
zh: 罗摩王子被流放，妻子悉多被魔王劫走。罗摩率猴王哈努曼大军攻打楞伽岛，战胜魔王救回妻子。
en2: Prince Rama of Ayodhya was exiled to the forest for fourteen years by palace intrigue. While there, the ten-headed demon king Ravana kidnapped his beloved wife Sita. Rama forged an alliance with Hanuman and an army of monkeys, crossed the ocean to Lanka, and waged an epic war to rescue Sita and reclaim his kingdom.

name: 象头神迦尼萨
zh: 湿婆砍下误认的儿子头颅后悔恨不已，用大象头颅替换。迦尼萨成为智慧与好运之神。
en2: The goddess Parvati formed a boy from clay to guard her door while she bathed. When Shiva returned and the boy blocked his entry, Shiva beheaded him in a rage. Horrified at the mistake, Parvati demanded he be restored to life. Shiva sent servants to bring the head of the first creature found — an elephant — giving birth to Ganesha.

name: 摩诃婆罗多
zh: 般度族与俱卢族为王位在俱卢之野展开大战。克里希纳向阿周那传授薄伽梵歌的智慧。
en2: Two cousin clans, the Pandavas and Kauravas, could not share a kingdom. Their conflict led to the catastrophic Battle of Kurukshetra. Before the battle, the god Krishna counseled the warrior Arjuna, who was paralyzed seeing relatives on both sides. Their dialogue on duty, soul, and dharma became the Bhagavad Gita.

name: 毗湿奴十化身
zh: 毗湿奴有十大化身保护世界：鱼救大洪水，龟托起乳海，野猪救大地，人狮杀魔王。
en2: Vishnu, the preserver of the cosmos, took ten avatars to save the world at its darkest moments. As Matsya the fish he warned of the great flood; as Kurma the tortoise he supported Mount Mandara; as Varaha the boar he lifted the earth from the cosmic sea; as Narasimha the man-lion he slew the demon Hiranyakashipu.

name: 哈努曼飞跃大海
zh: 猴神哈努曼纵身飞跃大海前往楞伽岛。一路战胜海中妖怪，找到悉多传达罗摩讯息。
en2: To rescue Sita from Lanka, Hanuman made an impossible leap across the ocean. He fought the demoness Surasa and the shadow-grasper Chhaya along the way. He found Sita imprisoned in the Ashoka garden, delivered Rama's ring as proof of hope, and then burned Lanka with fire that Ravana's soldiers had set on his own tail.

name: 吉尔伽美什
zh: 乌鲁克王吉尔伽美什与恩奇都结为挚友。恩奇都死后，吉尔伽美什寻求永生，最终接受人终有一死。
en2: Gilgamesh, the mighty king of Uruk, met his match in Enkidu, a wild man of the forest. They wrestled, then became brothers. When the gods killed Enkidu, Gilgamesh was shattered. He searched the world's ends for the secret of immortality, found it, and lost it to a serpent — learning at last that glory, not endless life, is a hero's true legacy.

name: 苏美尔大洪水
zh: 神灵降大洪水灭世。智慧神恩基警告祭司王造方舟，渡过七日七夜大水，方舟载生灵存续。
en2: The gods, weary of humanity's noise, decreed a great flood to destroy them. But the wise god Enki whispered a warning through a wall to the pious king Ziusudra: build a great boat. For seven days and nights the deluge raged. When the storm subsided, Ziusudra released birds to find dry land and made offerings to the grateful gods.

name: 伊南娜下冥界
zh: 女神伊南娜下冥界拜访姐姐。经七道门每道门脱去一件衣物，赤裸死去。后被救活须找替身。
en2: The queen of heaven, Inanna, descended to the Great Below to attend her sister's husband's funeral. At each of the seven gates, the gatekeepers stripped away one of her divine powers and garments. She arrived naked and was killed. The world above withered without her — until the gods negotiated her release at a terrible price.

name: 提亚马特
zh: 原初之龙提亚马特代表混沌之海。马杜克斩杀提亚马特，用她的身体创造天地万物。
en2: In the beginning, primordial saltwater Tiamat and freshwater Apsu mingled, generating the first gods. When the gods grew noisy, Apsu planned to destroy them but was killed first. Enraged, Tiamat raised an army of monsters. The young god Marduk challenged her to single combat, slew her, and split her body to form heaven and earth.

name: 檀君神话
zh: 天神之子桓雄下凡。一只熊吃蒜和艾草百日后化为女人，与桓雄生下檀君，建立古朝鲜。
en2: The god Hwanin sent his son Hwanung to earth on the peak of Mount Taebaek. A tiger and a bear both prayed to become human. Hwanung gave them mugwort and garlic and told them to endure a cave for one hundred days. The bear persevered and became a woman. She and Hwanung had a son — Dangun, who founded the kingdom of Gojoseon in 2333 BCE.

name: 春香传
zh: 春香与贵公子李梦龙相爱。春香被投狱，李梦龙高中后救出春香终得团圆。
en2: Chunhyang, daughter of a courtesan, and Yi Mongryong, son of a magistrate, fell deeply in love. When Yi left for the capital to take the civil examination, a corrupt new governor tried to force Chunhyang into his service. She refused and was beaten and imprisoned. Yi returned as a royal inspector and freed her.

name: 九尾狐
zh: 九尾狐化为美女引诱男子。有些版本中她渴望成为真正的人类，若能忍住百日便可化人。
en2: A fox that lives for a thousand years gains the power to transform into a beautiful woman. The gumiho seduces men and consumes their livers. In gentler tales, she yearns to become truly human, needing one hundred days of her secret remaining undiscovered. A rare few stories end with her transformation — and redemption.

name: 羽蛇神
zh: 羽蛇神是智慧与风之神，创造了人类并教授文明。他承诺有一天会从东方归来。
en2: The Feathered Serpent was worshipped across ancient Mexico as god of wind, learning, and civilization. He taught humanity agriculture, the calendar, and the arts. Shamed by a rival god into exile, he departed on a raft of serpents, promising to return from the east. When Cortés arrived centuries later, some believed the prophecy fulfilled.

name: 五个太阳
zh: 阿兹特克人相信世界经历五个太阳纪。前四个被风、火、雨、洪水毁灭。我们活在第五个太阳纪。
en2: Aztec cosmology held that the world had been created and destroyed four times. The First Sun was devoured by jaguars, the Second swept away by wind, the Third consumed by raining fire, the Fourth drowned in flood. Our age — the Fifth Sun — was born at Teotihuacan when the gods sacrificed themselves to become the sun and moon.

name: 双胞胎英雄
zh: 玛雅双胞胎英雄前往冥界与死神球赛，用智慧战胜死亡之主，最终化为太阳和月亮。
en2: In the Mayan Popol Vuh, the Hero Twins Hunahpu and Xbalanque were summoned to Xibalba, the underworld, to play the sacred ball game against the lords of death. Through wit, deception, and courage they defeated the death lords one by one. Killed and resurrected, they were finally transformed into the sun and moon.

name: 奥巴塔拉创世
zh: 至高神命奥巴塔拉从天降下，用沙土铺在原初之水上创造大地，放鸡刨出陆地。
en2: The supreme god Olodumare commissioned the orisha Obatala to descend from heaven and create solid land. Obatala slid down an iron chain from the sky, carrying a snail shell full of sand and a five-toed hen. The hen scratched and spread the sand across the primordial waters, forming the first earth at Ile-Ife, the sacred center of the world.

name: 尚戈雷神
zh: 尚戈是约鲁巴的雷电之神，曾是奥约帝国第三任国王。他口吐雷火，死后化为风暴之神。
en2: Shango was once the third Alaafin — king — of the Oyo Empire, renowned for his fierce temper and ability to breathe fire. When he accidentally destroyed his own palace with lightning, he was overcome with shame and hanged himself. He ascended as an orisha — the thunder deity — and now every thunderstrike is said to be Shango dancing.

name: 阿南西蜘蛛
zh: 蜘蛛阿南西用诡计战胜比他强大的对手，收集了世界上所有的故事。
en2: Anansi the spider bargained with Nyame, the sky god, to purchase all the world's stories. Nyame demanded Anansi capture four impossible things: a swarm of hornets, a python, a leopard, and a fairy. Through cleverness and cunning, Anansi delivered them all. The sky god kept his word — and that is why all stories belong to the spider.

name: 彩虹蛇
zh: 彩虹蛇是梦幻时代最重要的神灵。它在大地上移动时创造了河流、山谷和湖泊。
en2: The Rainbow Serpent is among the world's oldest continuing religious beliefs. During the Dreamtime, this immense being traveled across the bare landscape, carving rivers, gorges, and waterholes as it moved. It brought rain and life but also destruction when offended. It rests still beneath permanent waterholes, alive and watchful.

name: 梦幻时代
zh: 梦幻时代是万物被创造的永恒时期。祖先灵魂在大地上旅行，歌唱世界使之成形。
en2: The Dreamtime is not a distant past but an ever-present spiritual reality in Aboriginal culture. Ancestral beings of great power traveled the bare continent, and their songs called mountains, rivers, and living things into existence. These creation paths — songlines — can still be walked and sung across Australia today.

name: 图皮大洪水
zh: 创世神因人类堕落而降大洪水。一对兄妹爬上棕榈树幸存，重新繁衍人类。
en2: The Tupi people of Brazil tell of a time when the creator god grew angry at humanity's corruption and sent a great deluge to wash the world clean. Only two siblings survived by climbing to the crown of a tall palm tree and clinging there until the waters receded. They descended and became the parents of a new human race.

name: 粉红海豚
zh: 亚马逊河的粉红海豚在满月之夜变成英俊白衣男子，来到河边村庄引诱年轻女子。
en2: In the Amazon basin, locals have long told of the Boto — the pink river dolphin — that transforms into a handsome, white-suited man on moonlit festival nights. He appears among the crowd, seduces young women, and returns to the river before dawn. An unexplained pregnancy is traditionally attributed to the Boto Encantado.

name: 印提太阳神
zh: 印加太阳神印提派儿女建立库斯科，开创印加帝国。太阳节至今仍是秘鲁最盛大的庆典。
en2: Inti, the radiant sun god, was the supreme deity of the Inca Empire and the divine ancestor of the royal dynasty. He sent his children — Manco Cápac and Mama Ocllo — from Lake Titicaca to found Cusco, capital of Tawantinsuyu. Inti Raymi, the Festival of the Sun held each June solstice, was the empire's most sacred celebration.

name: 维拉科查创世
zh: 维拉科查从的的喀喀湖中升起，创造太阳月亮星辰。用泥土造人，不满意的用洪水毁灭后重新创造。
en2: Viracocha, the Andean creator god, rose from the depths of Lake Titicaca in primordial darkness. He first created giants but sent a flood to destroy them. From clay he fashioned new humans and sent them underground to emerge at sacred sites across the land. Then he walked westward across the Pacific and vanished into the sea.

name: 图安麦卡里尔
zh: 图安经历多次转世——从人变鹿变鹰变鱼再变人，见证了爱尔兰所有入侵。
en2: Tuan mac Cairill survived every invasion of Ireland across thousands of years by transforming his shape. He lived as a man, then a stag, then a wild boar, an eagle, and finally a salmon — swallowed by a queen and reborn as a man. He lived long enough to tell the Christian monks the complete ancient history of Ireland.

name: 库丘林
zh: 库丘林是爱尔兰最伟大的英雄。七岁杀死猛犬，战斗时变身狂暴形态，以一人之力守卫阿尔斯特。
en2: Born Setanta, he earned the name Cu Chulainn after killing a blacksmith's fierce guard dog at age seven. Trained by the warrior goddess Scathach, he mastered the deadly Gáe Bulg spear. In battle he underwent a terrifying transformation — the ríastrad — becoming monstrous and unstoppable, defending Ulster single-handedly against Connacht.

name: 利尔的孩子们
zh: 国王利尔的四个孩子被继母诅咒变成天鹅九百年。漂泊三处湖泊后恢复人形时已白发苍苍。
en2: The sea god Lir's four beloved children were transformed into swans by their jealous stepmother Aoife for nine hundred years. They drifted through three great Irish lakes, singing heartbreaking songs to all who heard them. When church bells finally broke the spell, they were revealed as ancient, white-haired people who died soon after.

name: 芭芭雅嘎
zh: 芭芭雅嘎住在鸡腿上的小屋里，是可怕的老巫婆。但她有时也帮助勇敢善良的年轻人。
en2: Baba Yaga is the great witch of Russian folklore — bony-legged, iron-toothed, flying through the forest in a mortar and pestle. She lives in a hut that stands on chicken legs and can turn to face any direction. Those who seek her must complete impossible tasks with courage. The cowardly she devours; the brave she sometimes helps.

name: 火鸟
zh: 火鸟是光芒四射的魔法鸟。伊万王子捡到金羽踏上旅途，最终赢得公主和王国。
en2: The Firebird blazes like a living flame, its feathers glowing gold and scarlet, its eyes glittering like crystal. Tsars command heroes to capture it. Prince Ivan found a single fallen feather that drew him into a chain of impossible quests — capturing the Firebird, fetching a faraway bride — until the Firebird helped him win a kingdom.

name: 瓦西丽莎
zh: 瓦西丽莎被赶去芭芭雅嘎处取火。靠母亲留下的魔法娃娃完成任务，带回魔火烧死恶人。
en2: Vasilisa's dying mother left her a magical carved doll that could help in times of need. When her stepmother sent her into the dark forest to fetch fire from the fearsome Baba Yaga, the doll guided her safely and did the impossible chores on her behalf. She earned a skull lantern with eyes of living fire — which burned her enemies to ash.

name: 毛伊钓岛
en: Maui Fishes Up the North Island
zh: 半神毛伊用祖母的魔法鱼钩从海底钓起一条巨鱼——那就是新西兰北岛。
en2: The demigod Maui was the great trickster and hero of Polynesian legend. He fished the North Island of New Zealand up from the ocean using his grandmother Murirangawhenua's enchanted jawbone hook. He also lassoed the sun to slow it down and lengthen the day, and stole fire from the underworld for humanity.

name: 朗伊与帕帕
zh: 天父朗伊与地母帕帕紧紧相拥，孩子们困在黑暗中。森林之神塔尼将他们分开，光明照进世界。
en2: In Maori creation, Ranginui the Sky Father and Papatuanuku the Earth Mother held each other in an eternal embrace, leaving their children trapped in cramped darkness between them. The god of forests, Tane, lay on his back and pushed them apart with great force. Light flooded the world for the first time. Rangi's tears of separation fall as rain.

name: 伊鲁扬卡斯
zh: 赫梯风暴之神与巨龙伊鲁扬卡斯战斗。第一次败北，第二次在人类帮助下终于战胜巨龙。
en2: In Hittite mythology, the storm god fought the great dragon Illuyanka and was badly defeated in their first battle. He sought human help to devise a trap — luring the dragon to a great feast where it ate and drank until it could not move. He slew it then. In a second version, the cost of victory was the storm god's own son.

name: 戈尔迪之结
zh: 无人能解的戈尔迪之结——谁解开谁统治亚洲。亚历山大大帝一剑斩断。
en2: In the ancient Phrygian capital of Gordium, a wagon was tied to a post with an impossibly tangled knot of cornel bark. An oracle decreed that whoever untied it would rule all of Asia. Generations of men attempted and failed. Alexander the Great arrived in 333 BCE, examined the knot briefly, then drew his sword and sliced through it.

name: 阿拉丁与神灯
zh: 穷少年阿拉丁进入魔窟取灯。灯中精灵助他赢得公主，魔法师夺灯后阿拉丁凭智慧夺回。
en2: Aladdin was a poor young man tricked by a sorcerer into retrieving a magic lamp from a sealed cave. He accidentally rubbed the lamp, releasing a djinn of immense power who granted his wishes. He won a princess and a palace. When the sorcerer later stole the lamp, Aladdin used wits rather than wishes to outsmart him and reclaim everything.

name: 辛巴达航海
zh: 辛巴达七次远航，遭遇巨鸟洛克、独眼巨人、磁力山、钻石谷等奇遇。
en2: Sinbad the Sailor made seven extraordinary voyages into unknown seas from Basra. He rode the monstrous Roc bird, blinded a one-eyed giant, escaped from the Old Man of the Sea who clung to his shoulders, navigated the Magnetic Mountain that pulled ships apart, and traversed valleys carpeted with diamonds guarded by giant serpents.

name: 一千零一夜
zh: 谢赫拉扎德每夜讲一个故事留悬念。一千零一夜后国王爱上了她，她用故事拯救了自己的生命。
en2: King Shahryar, betrayed by his queen, married a new woman each night and had her executed by morning. The vizier's daughter Scheherazade volunteered to be his bride. She told him a story each night, always pausing at the most suspenseful moment at dawn. The king kept her alive night after night — for one thousand and one nights.

name: 罗慕路斯与雷慕斯
zh: 双胞胎被遗弃在台伯河边，被母狼喂养长大。罗慕路斯杀死弟弟后建立了罗马城。
en2: The twin sons of Mars and the princess Rhea Silvia were thrown into the Tiber to drown. They washed ashore and were nursed by a she-wolf on the Palatine Hill. Raised by a shepherd, they grew into leaders. When Romulus and Remus quarreled over their city's site, Romulus killed his brother and founded Rome alone — naming it for himself.

name: 匹诺曹
zh: 老木匠造了木偶匹诺曹。他渴望成为真正的孩子，经历冒险后学会诚实善良，仙女将他变成真人。
en2: Geppetto carved a puppet from enchanted wood that immediately came alive. Pinocchio's nose grew with every lie, and his adventures — running away, falling into the clutches of a fox and cat, becoming a donkey in the Land of Toys — were all consequences of his own dishonesty. Only by choosing truth and self-sacrifice was he made a real boy.
